cards.sentence_en: The weather is really nice today.
It took way longer than I expected.
cards.hint_chunk: It took way longer than + 주어 + expected
hang out with + 사람 / hang out at + 장소
catch up with + 사람 / catch up on + 일·뉴스
be swamped (with + 명사) — 일·요청이 넘쳐나는 상태

cards.sentence_en: I think I'll be a little late.

cards.sentence_ko: 나 어제 잠을 잘 못 잤어.
cards.sentence_en: I didn't sleep well last night.
If you have time, let's talk about it later.
cards.hint_chunk: If you have time, let's + 동사

cards.sentence_en: I'll do it the way you said.
cards.hint_chunk: I'll do it the way + 주어+동사

cards.sentence_en: Let's take a break once we're done with this.
cards.hint_chunk: Let's take a break once + 주어+동사

cards.sentence_ko: 나 요즘 운동을 꾸준히 하고 있어.
cards.sentence_en: I've been working out regularly these days.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 내가 너였다면 그렇게 안 했을 거야.
cards.sentence_en: If I were you, I wouldn't do that.
cards.hint_chunk: If I were you, I wouldn't + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 이 일은 생각보다 오래 걸릴 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: This is going to take longer than I thought.
cards.hint_chunk: This is going to take longer than + 주어+동사

cards.sentence_ko: 그 사람이 그렇게 말했다는 게 믿기지 않아.
cards.sentence_en: I can't believe he said that.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 문제는 우리가 같이 해결해야 할 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: I think we need to solve this together.
cards.hint_chunk: I think we need to + 동사

cards.sentence_en: I meant to do that, but I forgot.
cards.hint_chunk: I meant to + 동사, but I forgot

cards.sentence_ko: 이 카페는 내가 자주 가는 곳이야.
cards.sentence_en: This is the café I usually go to.
cards.hint_chunk: This is the 명사 + I usually + 동사

cards.sentence_en: If you stay up late, you'll be tired the next day.
cards.hint_chunk: If you + 동사, you'll be + 형용사

cards.sentence_ko: 그 사람이 왜 그랬는지 이해가 안 가.
cards.sentence_en: I don't understand why he did that.
Let me know if the plan changes.
I'm on my way to the airport.
cards.hint_chunk: I'm on my way to + 장소

cards.sentence_en: Can I take a picture here?

extension_words.en: I'm not sure where I am

cards.sentence_en: Could you call a taxi for me?
How long does it take from here?
cards.hint_chunk: How long does it take + from/to?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 짐 좀 맡아 주실 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you hold this bag for me?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you hold + 명사 + for me?

cards.sentence_ko: 제가 다음 비행기를 탈 수 있을지 확인해 주시겠어요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you check if I can catch the next flight?
Can I get a refund for this ticket?
cards.hint_chunk: Can I get a refund for + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: I think I lost my luggage.

cards.sentence_ko: 여기서 시내까지 어떻게 가는 게 제일 빨라요?
cards.sentence_en: What's the fastest way to get downtown from here?
cards.hint_chunk: What's the fastest way to + 동사?

cards.sentence_en: I heard my flight has been delayed.
cards.hint_chunk: I heard + 주어 + has been + 과거분사

cards.sentence_en: Where do I go to transfer?
cards.hint_chunk: Where do I go to + 동사?

cards.sentence_ko: 방을 하루 더 연장할 수 있을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Could I extend my stay by one more night?
cards.hint_chunk: Could I extend + 명사 + by + 기간?

cards.sentence_en: I'm not sure if this is the right way.

cards.sentence_ko: 제가 예약한 방이 다른 방으로 바뀐 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: It looks like my room was changed to a different one.
cards.hint_chunk: It looks like + 주어 + was + 과거분사

cards.sentence_en: What happens if I miss the next train?
What should I do if I lose my passport?
cards.hint_chunk: What should I do if + 주어+동사?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 근처에 괜찮은 숙소 좀 추천해 주시겠어요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you recommend a good place to stay nearby?
Where do I go to check in my luggage?
cards.hint_chunk: Where do I go to + 동사?

cards.sentence_en: Would it be rude to take a picture here?
cards.hint_chunk: Would it be rude to + 동사?

cards.sentence_en: Can I get this to go?
cards.hint_chunk: Can I get + 명사 + to go?

cards.sentence_en: Can I get a refill on my coffee?
cards.hint_chunk: Can I get a refill on + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: Do you have a dessert menu?

cards.sentence_ko: 이거 좀 데워 주실 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you heat this up for me?

cards.sentence_ko: 혹시 땅콩 알레르기가 있는데, 이 음식에 땅콩이 들어가나요?
cards.sentence_en: I have a peanut allergy — does this dish contain peanuts?

cards.sentence_ko: 주문한 지 30분이 지났는데 아직 안 나왔어요.
cards.sentence_en: It's been 30 minutes since I ordered, and it still hasn't come out.

cards.sentence_ko: 이거 덜 맵게 해주실 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you make this less spicy?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you make this less + 형용사?

cards.sentence_ko: 혹시 자리를 창가 쪽으로 옮길 수 있을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Could we move to a table by the window?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 메뉴에 어떤 재료가 들어가는지 알 수 있을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you tell me what ingredients are in this dish?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you tell me what + 명사 + are in + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: I think the bill is wrong.
Is there a table available without a reservation?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 음료는 얼음을 적게 넣어주실 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you put less ice in this drink?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you put less + 명사 + in + 명사?

cards.sentence_ko: 남은 음식은 포장해 주실 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you pack the leftovers for me?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you pack + 명사 + for me?

cards.sentence_ko: 저희가 주문한 게 아직도 안 나왔어요.
cards.sentence_en: Our order still hasn't come out yet.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 자리가 좀 시끄러운데 다른 자리로 옮겨도 될까요?
cards.sentence_en: This table is a bit noisy — could we move to another one?
Do you have any vegetarian options?
Can we split the bill on separate cards?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 음식이 다른 테이블 것과 섞인 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: I think this dish got mixed up with another table's order.

cards.sentence_ko: 여기 자리를 좀 더 오래 써도 괜찮을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Would it be okay if we stayed a bit longer at this table?
cards.hint_chunk: Would it be okay if + 주어+동사?

cards.sentence_en: Do you have this in another color?
cards.hint_chunk: Do you have this in + 명사?

cards.sentence_ko: 사이즈 좀 더 큰 거 있어요?
cards.sentence_en: Do you have a bigger size?
Can I get a refund for this?
cards.hint_chunk: Can I get a refund for + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: Do other stores have this too?
cards.hint_chunk: Do other + 명사 + have this too?

cards.sentence_en: Could I get one more bag?
cards.hint_chunk: Could I get one more + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: Is this sold as a set?

cards.sentence_ko: 이거 어제 샀는데 사이즈가 안 맞아서 교환하고 싶어요.
cards.sentence_en: I bought this yesterday, but it doesn't fit, so I'd like to exchange it.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어+동사, but 주어+동사, so 주어 + would like to + 동사

cards.sentence_en: Is it possible to get a refund even without a receipt?
cards.hint_chunk: Is it possible to + 동사 + even without + 명사?

cards.sentence_ko: 이 제품은 온라인에서 산 게 더 싼 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: It seems like this product is cheaper online.

cards.sentence_ko: 세일 기간이 언제까지인지 알 수 있을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Could you tell me until when the sale is running?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you tell me until when + 주어+동사?

cards.sentence_en: Do you have this in every color?
cards.hint_chunk: Do you have this in every + 명사?

cards.sentence_en: Do I get a discount if I pay with this card?
cards.hint_chunk: Do I get + 명사 + if + 주어+동사?

cards.sentence_ko: 제가 산 물건이 파손된 채로 왔어요.
cards.sentence_en: The item I bought arrived damaged.

cards.sentence_ko: 이거 다른 지점에서 예약할 수 있을까요?
cards.sentence_en: Could I reserve this at another branch?
cards.hint_chunk: Could I reserve + 명사 + at + 명사?

cards.sentence_ko: 사이즈를 잘못 주문한 것 같아서 바꾸고 싶어요.
cards.sentence_en: I think I ordered the wrong size, so I'd like to change it.
cards.hint_chunk: I think + 주어+동사, so 주어 + would like to + 동사

cards.sentence_en: Is it possible to pay with points?
This is different from the price I saw online.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + is different from + 명사 + I + 동사

cards.sentence_en: What do I need to do to return this?
cards.hint_chunk: What do I need to do to + 동사?

cards.sentence_en: When will this item be back in stock?
cards.hint_chunk: When will + 명사 + be back in stock?

cards.sentence_ko: 혹시 세금 환급도 여기서 받을 수 있나요?
cards.sentence_en: Can I also get a tax refund here?
I've had a headache since yesterday.

cards.sentence_ko: 이걸 끝내려면 시간이 좀 더 필요할 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: I think I'll need a bit more time to finish this.
cards.hint_chunk: I think I'll need + 명사 + to + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 그가 왜 늦게 왔는지 아직도 모르겠어.
cards.sentence_en: I still don't know why he came late.
cards.hint_chunk: I still don't know why + 주어+동사

cards.sentence_ko: 시간이 좀 더 있으면 나도 같이 갈 텐데.
cards.sentence_en: If I had a bit more time, I'd go with you.
cards.hint_chunk: If I had + 명사, I'd + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 마감이 다가오고 있어서 요즘 잠을 잘 못 자.
cards.sentence_en: Since the deadline is coming up, I haven't been sleeping well lately.

cards.sentence_ko: 예약을 안 하면 그 식당은 자리가 없을 수도 있어.
cards.sentence_en: If you don't make a reservation, that restaurant might not have a table.
cards.hint_chunk: If you don't + 동사, 주어 + might not + 동사

cards.sentence_en: I started that but gave up halfway through.

cards.sentence_ko: 나 요즘 스마트폰을 너무 많이 보는 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: I feel like I've been staring at my phone too much lately.
cards.hint_chunk: I feel like + 주어 + have been + ~ing

cards.sentence_ko: 그 얘기를 듣고 나니까 좀 안심이 됐어.
cards.sentence_en: After hearing that, I felt a bit relieved.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 노래를 들을 때마다 옛날 생각이 나.
cards.sentence_en: Whenever I hear this song, it reminds me of the old days.
cards.hint_chunk: Whenever + 주어+동사, 주어 + reminds me of + 명사

cards.sentence_ko: 내가 먼저 사과했어야 했는데 그러지 못했어.
cards.sentence_en: I should have apologized first, but I didn't.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + should have + 과거분사, but + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 이 드라마는 볼수록 더 재밌어지는 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: This drama seems to get more interesting the more I watch it.
cards.hint_chunk: the more + 주어+동사, the more + 형용사

cards.sentence_ko: 나 요즘 아침에 일어나는 게 점점 힘들어지고 있어.
cards.sentence_en: Getting up in the morning has been getting harder for me lately.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 사람 얘기를 들어보니까 사정이 있었더라.
cards.sentence_en: Once I heard his side of the story, it turned out he had a good reason.
cards.hint_chunk: Once + 주어+동사, it turned out + 주어+동사

cards.sentence_ko: 이거 다음 주까지 끝내 놓으면 좀 여유가 생길 거야.
cards.sentence_en: If I get this done by next week, I'll have some breathing room.
cards.hint_chunk: If I get + 명사 + done by + 시간, I'll have + 명사

cards.sentence_en: Is now a good time to talk?
cards.hint_chunk: Is now a good time to + 동사?

cards.sentence_en: I'll call you back in a bit.
cards.hint_chunk: I'll call you back + 시간 표현

cards.sentence_en: I'm in a meeting right now.
cards.hint_chunk: I'm in a + 명사 + right now

cards.sentence_ko: 전화 왔을 때 마침 회의 중이라 못 받았어.
cards.sentence_en: When you called, I happened to be in a meeting, so I couldn't pick up.
cards.hint_chunk: When + 절, 주어 + happened to be + ~ing, so + 동사

cards.sentence_en: I kept getting calls, so I checked, and it turned out to be spam.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + kept + ~ing, so + 동사, and it turned out + 명사

cards.sentence_ko: 통화 중에 갑자기 전화가 끊겨서 다시 걸었어.
cards.sentence_en: The call suddenly dropped, so I called back.

cards.sentence_ko: 전화하기 전에 문자로 먼저 물어보는 게 나을 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: I think it'd be better to text first before calling.
cards.hint_chunk: I think it'd be better to + 동사 + before + ~ing

cards.sentence_ko: 그 사람한테 전화가 왔었는데 나도 모르게 놓쳤어.
cards.sentence_en: He called me, but I missed it without even realizing.
If you don't answer the phone, at least leave a text.
cards.hint_chunk: If you don't + 동사, at least + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 전화가 오면 바로 받을 수 있게 손에 들고 있었어.
cards.sentence_en: I was holding my phone so I could answer right away if it rang.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + was + ~ing + so + 주어 + could + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 통화 연결이 될 때까지 계속 다시 걸었어.
cards.sentence_en: I kept calling again and again until it connected.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 사람이 전화를 안 받아서 결국 문자로 남겼어.
cards.sentence_en: Since he wasn't answering the phone, I ended up leaving a text instead.

cards.sentence_ko: 전화기가 꺼져 있어서 연락이 안 됐어.
cards.sentence_en: His phone was off, so I couldn't reach him.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + was off, so + 주어 + couldn't + 동사

cards.sentence_ko: 전화 목소리를 들어보니까 뭔가 화가 난 것 같았어.
cards.sentence_en: Judging from his voice on the phone, he seemed a bit upset.
cards.hint_chunk: Judging from + 명사, 주어 + seemed + 형용사

cards.sentence_ko: 급한 일이 아니면 문자로 남겨줘도 될 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: Unless it's urgent, you can just leave a text instead.

cards.sentence_ko: 전화가 하도 많이 와서 무음으로 해놨어.
cards.sentence_en: I got so many calls that I put my phone on silent.
cards.hint_chunk: 주어 + got so many + 명사 + that + 절

cards.sentence_ko: 통화 목록을 보니까 부재중 전화가 다섯 통이나 있었어.
cards.sentence_en: When I checked my call log, I had five missed calls.
That made me kind of sad.
I'm in a really good mood today.
I'm a bit jealous of him.
I was really touched by that.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 얘기 들었을 때 나도 모르게 눈물이 났어.
cards.sentence_en: When I heard that, I couldn't help crying.

cards.sentence_ko: 걔가 그렇게 말할 줄은 몰랐어서 좀 당황했어.
cards.sentence_en: I was kind of thrown off because I didn't expect him to say that.

cards.sentence_ko: 시간이 지나면 지날수록 점점 더 화가 났어.
cards.sentence_en: The more time passed, the angrier I got.

extension_words.en: the more I think about it

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 걔가 미리 말해줬더라면 이렇게까지 서운하진 않았을 거야.
cards.sentence_en: If he had told me earlier, I wouldn't have felt this hurt.
cards.hint_chunk: If + had p.p, would have p.p (가정법 과거완료)

extension_words.en: if only he had said something

cards.sentence_ko: 그 소식을 듣고 나서부터 계속 마음이 불편해.
cards.sentence_en: I've felt uneasy ever since I heard the news.
cards.hint_chunk: have p.p + ever since (그 이후로 계속 ~하다)

cards.sentence_ko: 걔가 사과할 줄은 상상도 못했는데 그래서 더 감동받았어.
cards.sentence_en: I never imagined he'd apologize, so it touched me even more.
cards.hint_chunk: never imagined that + 절 (전혀 예상 못했다)

extension_words.en: caught me off guard in a good way
it meant a lot to me

cards.sentence_ko: 계속 무시당하는 느낌이 들어서 점점 지쳐가고 있어.
cards.sentence_en: I keep feeling ignored, and it's wearing me down.
cards.hint_chunk: keep -ing / wear 사람 down (점점 지치게 만들다)

extension_words.en: it's taking a toll on me

cards.sentence_ko: 그 결정이 나 대신 내려졌다는 걸 알고 나니 더 화가 났어.
cards.sentence_en: It turned out the decision had been made without me, which made me even angrier.

cards.sentence_ko: 걔랑 화해하고 나니까 마음이 훨씬 가벼워졌어.
cards.sentence_en: After making up with him, I felt so much lighter.

cards.sentence_ko: 겉으로는 괜찮은 척했지만 사실 속으로는 무너지고 있었어.
cards.sentence_en: I pretended to be fine on the outside, but inside I was falling apart.
cards.hint_chunk: pretend to be + 형용사, but 속마음

cards.sentence_ko: 그 얘기를 듣자마자 왠지 모르게 눈물이 핑 돌았어.
cards.sentence_en: As soon as I heard that, my eyes welled up for some reason.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 나였다면 그렇게 침착하게 반응하지 못했을 거야.
cards.sentence_en: If I were him, I don't think I could've stayed that calm.
cards.hint_chunk: 혼합 가정법 (If I were~, couldn't have p.p)

cards.sentence_ko: 계속 참다 보니까 나도 모르게 폭발해버렸어.
cards.sentence_en: After holding it in for so long, I ended up snapping without realizing it.

cards.sentence_ko: 걔가 그렇게까지 신경 써줄 줄은 몰랐어서 괜히 미안해졌어.
cards.sentence_en: I didn't expect him to care that much, so I ended up feeling kind of guilty.

cards.sentence_ko: 아무리 괜찮은 척해봐도 사람들은 다 눈치채는 것 같아.
cards.sentence_en: No matter how much I try to act okay, people always seem to notice.
I have to go to the doctor today.
I think I have a slight fever.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약 하루에 몇 번 먹어요?
cards.sentence_en: How many times a day do I take this medicine?
cards.hint_chunk: How many times a day + do I + 동사원형

cards.sentence_en: It hurts when I press here.
Does this medicine make me sleepy?
Can I get some digestive medicine?
Can I put this ointment on the wound?
cards.hint_chunk: Can I put + 명사 + on + 명사

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약은 하루 세 번 먹어야 해요.
cards.sentence_en: You need to take this medicine three times a day.

cards.sentence_ko: 어제부터 계속 열이 안 떨어져서 병원에 가보려고.
cards.sentence_en: My fever hasn't gone down since yesterday, so I'm thinking about seeing a doctor.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약을 먹은 후로 오히려 더 어지러워졌어요.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I started taking this medicine, I've actually felt more dizzy.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 증상이 계속되면 다시 오라고 하셨어요.
cards.sentence_en: The doctor said to come back if the symptoms continue.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약은 공복에 먹으면 속이 쓰릴 수 있대요.
cards.sentence_en: I heard this medicine can upset your stomach if you take it on an empty stomach.

cards.sentence_ko: 검사 결과가 나올 때까지 좀 기다려야 한다고 하셨어요.
cards.sentence_en: The doctor said I'd have to wait until the test results came out.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 약을 끊고 나서부터 오히려 몸이 더 편해졌어요.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I stopped taking that medicine, I've actually felt much better.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 이 증상이 일주일 넘게 계속되면 큰 병원에 가보는 게 좋대요.
cards.sentence_en: If these symptoms last more than a week, it's better to go to a bigger hospital.
cards.hint_chunk: If + 현재, it's better to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 이 처방전은 이미 다른 약국에서 조제됐다고 하더라고요.
cards.sentence_en: They told me this prescription had already been filled at another pharmacy.

cards.sentence_ko: 통증이 참을 수 없을 정도로 심해져서 결국 응급실에 갔어요.
cards.sentence_en: The pain got so bad that I couldn't stand it, so I ended up going to the ER.

extension_words.en: so severe that I couldn't sleep

cards.sentence_ko: 의사 선생님이 설명해 주기 전까지는 그게 부작용인 줄 몰랐어요.
cards.sentence_en: I didn't know it was a side effect until the doctor explained it to me.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약을 계속 먹다 보면 내성이 생길 수도 있대요.
cards.sentence_en: Apparently, if you keep taking this medicine, you can build up a tolerance to it.

cards.sentence_ko: 미리 검사받길 잘했어. 안 그랬으면 더 심해질 뻔했어.
cards.sentence_en: I'm glad I got checked early — otherwise it could have gotten a lot worse.

extension_words.en: if I hadn't caught it early

cards.sentence_ko: 약을 제때 안 먹어서 그런지 증상이 좀처럼 나아지질 않아요.
cards.sentence_en: Maybe it's because I haven't been taking the medicine on time, but the symptoms just aren't improving.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 약사분이 자세히 설명해준 덕분에 부작용을 미리 알 수 있었어요.
cards.sentence_en: Thanks to the pharmacist explaining it in detail, I was able to know about the side effects in advance.

extension_words.en: I was able to avoid it

cards.sentence_ko: 이 약이 듣기 시작하면서부터 통증이 서서히 가라앉고 있어요.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since this medicine started working, the pain has been gradually easing up.
I'm a bit busy right now.
Could you take a look at this part?
cards.hint_chunk: Could you take a look at + 명사

cards.sentence_en: What time does the meeting start?
I have to work late today.
The team leader is looking for you.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 프로젝트가 예정보다 늦어지고 있어서 팀장님께 미리 말씀드려야 할 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: Since this project is running behind schedule, I think I should let the team leader know in advance.
cards.hint_chunk: since + 절, I think I should + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 예산이 승인되지 않으면 일정을 다시 짜야 할 수도 있어요.
cards.sentence_en: If the budget isn't approved, we might have to rearrange the schedule.
cards.hint_chunk: If + 현재, might have to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 그 클라이언트가 갑자기 요구사항을 바꾸는 바람에 다시 작업해야 했어요.
cards.sentence_en: Because the client suddenly changed the requirements, we had to redo the work.

extension_words.en: go back to the drawing board

cards.sentence_ko: 이 계약은 검토가 끝나는 대로 바로 서명될 예정이에요.
cards.sentence_en: This contract is going to be signed as soon as the review is finished.
cards.hint_chunk: as soon as + 절, be going to be p.p (수동태)

cards.sentence_ko: 회의가 길어지는 바람에 다음 일정에 늦을 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: Since the meeting is running long, I think I'm going to be late for my next appointment.
cards.hint_chunk: since + 절, be going to be late

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 이 제안이 받아들여지지 않으면 다른 대안을 준비해야 해요.
cards.sentence_en: If this proposal doesn't get accepted, we'll need to prepare an alternative.
cards.hint_chunk: If + 현재, we'll need to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 그 보고서가 이미 검토된 걸로 알고 있었는데 다시 확인해보니 아니었어요.
cards.sentence_en: I thought the report had already been reviewed, but it turned out it hadn't.
cards.hint_chunk: had already been p.p, turned out (과거완료 수동태)

cards.sentence_ko: 예산을 초과하지 않는 선에서 최대한 빨리 진행해야 해요.
cards.sentence_en: We need to move forward as quickly as possible without going over budget.

cards.sentence_ko: 담당자가 갑자기 퇴사하는 바람에 인수인계가 제대로 안 됐어요.
cards.sentence_en: Because the person in charge suddenly quit, the handover wasn't done properly.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 자료가 없었더라면 발표를 제대로 준비하지 못했을 거예요.
cards.sentence_en: If it hadn't been for this data, I wouldn't have been able to prepare the presentation properly.
cards.hint_chunk: If it hadn't been for + 명사, wouldn't have p.p (가정법 과거완료)

cards.sentence_ko: 그 거래처와 계약을 맺은 지 벌써 3년이 넘었어요.
cards.sentence_en: It's been more than three years since we signed the contract with that client.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 프로젝트가 성공적으로 끝나서 다행이에요, 안 그랬으면 예산이 삭감될 뻔했거든요.
cards.sentence_en: I'm glad the project ended successfully — otherwise our budget could have been cut.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 이메일에 회신이 늦어지는 바람에 일정이 다 꼬여버렸어요.
cards.sentence_en: Because the reply to that email was delayed, the whole schedule got messed up.

cards.sentence_ko: 아무리 바빠도 이 보고서는 오늘 안에 끝내야 해요.
cards.sentence_en: No matter how busy I am, I have to finish this report by today.
cards.hint_chunk: no matter how + 형용사, have to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 그 계약 조건에 대해 다시 협상해볼 필요가 있을 것 같아요.
cards.sentence_en: I think we need to renegotiate the terms of that contract.
cards.hint_chunk: I think we need to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_en: Can I post this on Instagram?

cards.sentence_en: This photo came out really well.

I took a screenshot of this.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 게시물이 너무 빨리 퍼지는 바람에 순식간에 난리가 났어요.
cards.sentence_en: Because that post spread so quickly, everything blew up in no time.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 그 댓글을 안 지웠더라면 더 큰 논란이 됐을 거예요.
cards.sentence_en: If I hadn't deleted that comment, it would have caused a much bigger controversy.
cards.hint_chunk: If + had p.p, would have p.p (가정법 과거완료)

cards.sentence_ko: 계정이 해킹당한 걸 알고 나서부터 계속 불안했어요.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I found out my account had been hacked, I've felt anxious.
cards.hint_chunk: ever since + 절, had been p.p (과거완료 수동태)

cards.sentence_en: Ever since this app was updated, it's actually gotten slower.

cards.sentence_ko: 팔로워 수가 갑자기 줄어서 뭔가 문제가 있나 싶었어요.
cards.sentence_en: Since my follower count suddenly dropped, I wondered if something was wrong.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 영상이 삭제되기 전에 미리 저장해뒀어야 했는데.
cards.sentence_en: I should have saved that video before it got deleted.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 개인정보가 유출되지 않았더라면 이렇게까지 걱정하지 않았을 거예요.
cards.sentence_en: If my personal information hadn't been leaked, I wouldn't have worried this much.
cards.hint_chunk: If + had been p.p (수동태), wouldn't have p.p

cards.sentence_ko: 댓글 반응이 생각보다 안 좋아서 결국 그 게시물을 내렸어요.
cards.sentence_en: Since the comments weren't as positive as expected, I ended up taking down the post.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 플랫폼은 알고리즘이 계속 바뀌어서 따라가기가 점점 힘들어져요.
cards.sentence_en: Since this platform's algorithm keeps changing, it's getting harder and harder to keep up.
cards.hint_chunk: since + 절, it's getting harder to + 동사원형

cards.sentence_ko: 그 인플루언서가 광고인 걸 숨겼다는 게 밝혀지면서 논란이 커졌어요.
cards.sentence_en: As it came out that the influencer had hidden the fact it was an ad, the controversy grew.
cards.hint_chunk: as it came out that + 절 (과거완료)

cards.sentence_ko: 와이파이가 계속 끊겨서 화상회의 도중에 몇 번이나 다시 접속해야 했어요.
cards.sentence_en: Because the wifi kept cutting out, I had to reconnect several times during the video call.

cards.sentence_ko: 아무리 조심해도 피싱 문자에 속을 뻔했어요.

cards.hint_chunk: no matter how + 형용사, almost got p.p

cards.sentence_ko: 그 앱을 삭제하고 나서부터 오히려 집중이 훨씬 잘 돼요.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I deleted that app, I've actually been able to focus much better.

cards.sentence_ko: 이 사이트가 자꾸 다운되는 바람에 결제를 세 번이나 다시 시도했어요.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 미리 백업해두지 않았더라면 그 사진들을 전부 잃어버렸을 거예요.
cards.sentence_en: If I hadn't backed it up in advance, I would have lost all those photos.
cards.hint_chunk: If + had p.p, would have p.p (가정법 과거완료)

cards.sentence_en: What did you do this weekend?
I went to bed late last night.

cards.sentence_ko: 요즘 야근이 많아서 그런지 주말에는 완전히 뻗어 있어.
cards.sentence_en: Maybe it's because I've been working late a lot, but I'm completely wiped out on weekends.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 얘기 듣고 나서부터 계속 그 생각만 나.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I heard that, I can't stop thinking about it.

cards.sentence_en: If I'd had a bit more time, I would have gone on a trip.

cards.sentence_ko: 날씨가 갑자기 추워지는 바람에 옷을 다시 꺼내 입었어.
cards.sentence_en: Because the weather suddenly turned cold, I had to dig out my winter clothes again.

cards.sentence_ko: 만약 그때 그 제안을 받아들였더라면 지금 완전히 다른 삶을 살고 있었을 거야.
cards.sentence_en: If I had accepted that offer back then, I'd be living a completely different life now.
cards.hint_chunk: If + had p.p, would be -ing (혼합 가정법)

cards.sentence_ko: 이사한 후로 통근 시간이 훨씬 줄어서 훨씬 여유로워졌어.
cards.sentence_en: Ever since I moved, my commute has gotten a lot shorter, so I have much more free time.

cards.sentence_ko: 그 친구랑 오랜만에 연락했는데 예전이랑 똑같더라고.
